initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mornington') 
    - 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Amos') AS view_count_difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mornington') 
    - 
    (SELECT SUM(p.ViewCount) 
     FROM posts p 
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id 
     WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Amos') AS view_count_difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT ViewCount FROM posts WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Mornington')) - 
    (SELECT ViewCount FROM posts WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Amos'))
